title: ExpensiveDeaths
description: Take money from people when they die!
body:
![Spigot](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/supported/spigot/cozy.png) [![Paper](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/supported/paper/cozy.png)](https://papermc.io/downloads/paper) [![Vault](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/requires/vault/cozy.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/34315)

# ExpensiveDeaths

### This plugin requires Java 21 or higher.

---

ExpensiveDeaths allows you to take a player's **whole balance**, **percent value**, or a **fixed amount** of money when they die.

You can also set commands to run when the player dies and/or respawns, and can be run by both console and/or the player.

If desired, the economy portion of the plugin can even be disabled entirely.

---

### [Commands & Permissions](https://github.com/SilverstoneMC/ExpensiveDeaths/wiki/Commands-&-Permissions)
### [config.yml](https://github.com/SilverstoneMC/ExpensiveDeaths/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml)
